# Commit message template

```text
type(scope): summary

Evidence:
- source(s):
- measurement(s):
- screenshots / dyno overlays:

Change:
- .mr changes:
- docs changes:
- data changes:

Reason:
- why this change was made

Validation:
- start/no throttle:
- idle rpm:
- 1500 blip:
- 3000 blip:
- full-throttle blip:
- dyno peak hp/torque:

Risk:
- what may have been made worse

Next action:
- next small change
```
